# Tokenizer fast path

## Intent

Add a fast path to the tokenizer.

## Non-goals

- Not the grammar.

## Requirements

### AC-001 — fast path for ASCII

When input is ASCII-only, the tokenizer must use the fast path.

Verify with: `npm test -- tokenize`

## Open questions

- None (non-blocking).

## Affected areas

- `src/parser/tokenize.ts`
- `src/parser/grammar.ts`
